sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9659" key="a)ntepei/seimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπ-είσειμι</orth>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶμι</foreign> <sense id="n9659.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ibo</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enter in turn,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἰς τὰ ἀραιώματα</foreign> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
